case_title: NOEL, PAUL JR. et al vs. KENNEDY, DEIRDRE et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOEL, PAUL JR. NOEL, ANAMARIA AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEDY, DEIRDRE HINJOSA, LYNARD CHRIS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEDY, DEIRDRE HINJOSA, LYNARD CHRIS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEDY, DEIRDRE HINJOSA, LYNARD CHRIS

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOEL, PAUL JR. NOEL, ANAMARIA SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-03-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-10-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JURY TRIAL SET FOR JAN 10,1994 SETT CONF SET JAN 3,1994

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KENNEDY, DEIRDRE HINJOSA, LYNARD CHRIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 39 PRAGUE STREET, STAYED UNTIL FEB-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ENTER IMMEDIATELY BUT PHYSICAL EVICTION IS STAYED UNTIL 2-1-94. THE SECURITY DEPOSIT IS TO BE RETAINED BY LANDLORDS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KENNEDY, DEIRDRE HINJOSA, LYNARD CHRIS DOES 1 TO 10 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 39 PRAGUE STREET, STAYED UNTIL FEB-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ENTER IMMEDIATELY BUT PHYSICAL EVICTION IS STAYED UNTIL 2-1-94, 5 PM. THE SECURITY DEPOSIT IS TO BE RETAINED BY LANDLORDS.
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT JUDGMENT OF JAN-03-1994 SET ASIDE

THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS, PAUL AND ANAMARIE NOEL FOR POSSESSION AND RESTITUTION OF 39 PRAGUE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, 94112. THE RENTAL LEASE FOR THIS PROPERTY IS FORFEITED. PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL RENT THROUGH 2-1-94. A WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT PHYSICAL EVICTION SHALL BE STAYED THROUGH 5 PM, 2-1-94. PLAINTIFFS WAIVE ALL ATTY'S FEES. THE SECURITY DEPOSIT IS TO BE KEPT BY THE LANDLORDS. PLAINTIFFS WILL VACATE JUDGMENT IF DEFENDANTS MOVE BY 2-1-94 AND DEFENDANTS PREPARE APPROPRIATE PAPERWORK TO AFFECT SAME.
